member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetStiffnessHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetStiffnessHelper for sending a SetStiffness
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetStiffness
to.
member.remarks: Use this message to manually set the body stiffness values -before using Active Pose to drive to an animated pose, for example.
